message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in usage_analysis.zig

- Add for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body handlers to collectUsesInNode
- Add match_stmt handler to collectUsesInNode
- Add for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body, try_stmt else_body/finalbody, match_stmt to collectAssignedVars
- Add for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body, try_stmt, with_stmt, match_stmt to collectUsesExcludingLocals
